choices.text: OSHA's top 4 construction killers: Falls (#1, ~33% fatalities), Struck-by (vehicles, falling objects), Caught-in/between (trenches, machinery), Electrocution (power lines, tools). Fall protection required 6+ ft. Trench protection 5+ ft.
TRIR (Total Recordable Incident Rate) = (recordable incidents × 200,000) / total hours worked. Industry average ~3.0; best contractors <1.0. Tracked by OSHA, insurers, clients for prequalification.
